name: TankBattle 2 Player
description: Are you ready for the battle of tanks? Its duel time, the tanks are going to war. Two enemies must defeat each other. The player who maneuvers the fastest and the best wins. You fire first and destroy the enemy tank. Be the best player to defeat your opponent. Fight against your friend and defeat them.
instructions: To move the blue tank use the WASD keys Press the Q key to fire a shot To move the brown tank use the Arrow Keys keys Press the P key to fire a shot
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Action, Adventure, Arcade, Battle, Tank, Tanks
